jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FabAlley - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
